title: Hurry Up!
description: Kills you like its hardcore mode if you dont beat the dragon fast enough.
body:
# Hurry Up!
Mod that kills you (and puts you in spectator) if you dont play the game fast enough.

You start with 1:30min on the clock, and gain 2:30min every time you get an advancement. Can you beat the ender dragon in time?

**Please be cautious about using this in existing worlds, its designed for running from scratch**

## Can I have my world back?

Theres nothing in the mod to enable this, but you can enable cheats to go back to survival. On servers, ask the owner to fix it. On singleplayer, open to LAN with cheats enabled and youll be able to switch back.
